evidence_scope: Sanitized operator evidence for the production database password (SECRET_002) rotation only. Records test names, PASS/FAIL status, the PostgreSQL error code, the pooler classification, and the port. No password, no complete DATABASE_URL, no pooler URI containing credentials, no access token, no service-role key, no JWT signing secret, and no terminal transcript containing secret values appears in this artifact.

operator_action.method: Supabase Dashboard -> Settings -> Database -> Reset database password
operator_action.environment_of_action: operator-side, outside this audit execution environment

local_database_url_update.note: Full connection string and password remain redacted and were not written to the repository.

tests.result: Old password rejected by the server.
tests.interpretation: PostgreSQL error 28P01 (invalid_password) proves the old password is no longer accepted by the production Postgres role.

tests.result: New password established a connection and executed `select 1 as ok` successfully.
tests.interpretation: The replacement credential is valid and the production Postgres role is reachable through the Session pooler on port 5432.

post_test_cleanup.note: No temporary secret-bearing variable or script was left in the environment or the repository.

verdict_boundary.active_credential_risk: CLOSED — the exposed password was reset and the old credential was rejected (28P01).
verdict_boundary.historical_repository_exposure: PRESENT_BUT_REVOKED — the revoked plaintext credential remains in reachable Git history (commit 09023b0); it is no longer an active credential.
verdict_boundary.git_history_rewrite: NOT_EXECUTED — requires explicit operator approval and coordinated force-push planning with every clone holder.
verdict_boundary.other_providers_and_secrets: NOT_ROTATED — unchanged from 09_DEFERRED_OR_EXCLUDED_ITEMS.json; provider write access remains blocked for every other credential in this inventory.

explicitly_not_done_in_this_evidence_upd: No rotation of any credential other than SECRET_002.
No Supabase schema, data, RLS, Edge Function, RAG, embedding, migration, application code, deployment configuration or provider setting change.
No Git history rewrite and no force-push.
No pull request opened or merged.
No secret value printed, stored, inferred, recovered or requested.
